description: Style Note Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease with this set of three socks in white, pink and dark pink from puma. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this set offers exemplary comfort. Product Details Set of three pairs of socks in white, pink and dark pink Minimal seams on toe for abrasion-free wearDouble layered elasticated mouth for a comfortable wearBranding at the ankle Material and Care70% Cotton 29% Nylon 1% Elastane Machine wash in warm waterWash dark colours separately
